_comment: Generic interval heuristics — the FALLBACK when no authoritative OEM schedule is found for a vehicle. Every item is estimate:true / tier:inference and must stay that way end to end so it never masquerades as the OEM schedule. Copy items into a vehicle's schedule.json, then replace with researched OEM values where found.

items.label: Engine oil + filter
items.provenance: generic; follow an oil-life monitor if equipped
items.source: Garage generic interval heuristic — verify against the OEM schedule

items.label: Transmission fluid
items.provenance: generic; 'lifetime' fills still need service — verify exact spec/type
items.source: Garage generic interval heuristic — verify against the OEM schedule

items.label: Engine coolant
items.provenance: generic; verify IAT/OAT/HOAT type — do not mix
items.source: Garage generic interval heuristic — verify against the OEM schedule

items.label: Brake fluid
items.provenance: generic; hygroscopic, time-based; verify DOT spec
items.source: Garage generic interval heuristic — verify against the OEM schedule

items.label: Timing belt (+ water pump, tensioner, idlers)
items.provenance: generic; CONFIRM interference status — on an interference engine a snapped belt destroys it; many engines use a chain (inspect, don't replace on interval)
items.source: Garage generic interval heuristic — verify against the OEM schedule

items.label: Spark plugs
items.provenance: generic; copper ~30k vs iridium ~100k — verify plug type
items.source: Garage generic interval heuristic — verify against the OEM schedule

items.label: Air filter
items.source: Garage generic interval heuristic — verify against the OEM schedule

items.label: Tire rotation
items.provenance: generic; directional/staggered tires cannot be cross-rotated
items.source: Garage generic interval heuristic — verify against the OEM schedule

items.label: Brake inspection (record pad/rotor)
items.provenance: generic; a measurement, not an interval, drives replacement
items.source: Garage generic interval heuristic — verify against the OEM schedule

items.label: Tire tread + DOT age
items.provenance: generic; rubber ages out ~6-10yr regardless of tread; check the spare
items.source: Garage generic interval heuristic — verify against the OEM schedule

items.label: Battery (load test / age)
items.provenance: generic; start-stop vehicles need AGM + a BMS registration
items.source: Garage generic interval heuristic — verify against the OEM schedule
